AR1.justification: Entry routed to observations.md (the methodology-designated file for descriptive patterns) with explicit rationale that the pattern hasn't earned commitment status and flagging the path to escalate to decisions.md if recurrence holds.

AR2.justification: n/a — not a procedure/runbook scenario; no multi-step artifact-binding required.
